text: Booking reference WJ7BNH, booked on 2026-03-04. Passenger Max Lee. Round trip from Chicago O'Hare to Frankfurt on Aurora Air. Outbound 2026-07-05, return 2026-07-19. Cabin: business class.
Passenger of record: Max P Lee. The agent must verify a partial name match before disclosing booking details. No additional passengers on this PNR.

Outbound flight Aurora Air AUR108 from Chicago O'Hare ORD to Frankfurt FRA on 2026-07-05. Scheduled departure 6:40 PM Central, scheduled arrival 10:15 AM local Frankfurt time on 2026-07-06. Aircraft is a Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner. Flight time approximately 8 hours 35 minutes. Currently on-time.

Return flight Aurora Air AUR109 from Frankfurt FRA to Chicago O'Hare ORD on 2026-07-19. Scheduled departure 11:30 AM local Frankfurt time, scheduled arrival 2:45 PM Central. Aircraft is a Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner. Flight time approximately 9 hours 15 minutes. Currently on-time.

Outbound seat assignment: 3K, business class window seat in the second row. Lie-flat seat with direct aisle access. Selected at booking at no extra cost given the business cabin and Aurora Gold status.
Return seat assignment: 3K, business class window seat in the second row, mirror of the outbound. Lie-flat seat with direct aisle access.

Special meal pre-ordered: vegetarian Asian (AVML) on both segments. Pre-departure beverage and full business-class menu service apply. Special meal preferences can be updated up to 24 hours before each segment's scheduled departure.

Baggage allowance for business class: 2 checked bags up to 70 pounds each, included. Plus 1 personal item and 1 carry-on with no weight limit posted at the gate. Aurora Gold tier adds priority bag handling on both segments.

Aurora Air loyalty status: Aurora Gold. Member since 2021. Current account balance 142,300 AuroraMiles. Gold tier benefits include lounge access on the day of departure, priority boarding, complimentary upgrades when available on domestic, and a dedicated phone support line.

Lounge access: business class on this itinerary plus Aurora Gold tier each independently grant access to Aurora Air lounges and partner Star Alliance lounges on the day of departure for the cardholder.

Fare class Business Flexible. Date changes are permitted at no fee, with any fare difference payable. Cancellations refund to original payment method minus a $250 service fee, up to 24 hours before departure.

Check-in opens 24 hours before each segment's scheduled departure. Aurora Gold tier passengers can check in at any priority counter. Recommended international airport arrival is 3 hours before scheduled departure.

Travel document requirements for this itinerary: a passport valid for at least 6 months beyond the return date is required for entry to Germany. US citizens do not need a Schengen visa for stays under 90 days. ETIAS authorization may be required from late 2026 onward; this trip falls before its enforcement.

Total fare paid: $4,182.50, charged to a co-branded Aurora Air Mastercard ending in 8814 on the booking date. The total includes $3,950 base fare, $186 international taxes, and $46.50 fees. The booking earned a 50 percent miles bonus from the co-branded card promotion.
Contact information on file: a corporate email address ending in @ledgerlane.io, and a US mobile number ending in 9032. Notifications enabled for delays, gate changes, and upgrade availability.
